issues.title: No obvious grill triggers found
issues.description: The documents passed the built-in heuristic checks, but this is not a security review.
issues.impact: Subtle domain-specific bugs may still exist.
issues.fix: Run the strict Grill Me prompt with a model and add human review before implementation.

prompt_mode:
You are a senior software architect, security expert, and reliability engineer.

Your task is NOT to approve the design.
Your task is to BREAK the design.

Analyze the design aggressively and identify logic flaws, edge cases,
security issues, performance risks, and failure scenarios.
